goal: Clone pyknotid 0.5.3 to /app/pyknotid, confirm toolchain and NumPy version, and enumerate the NumPy 2.x compatibility issues that must be fixed in the Cython extensions.
summary: Phase 1 (Setup and inspect) complete. Cloned pyknotid 0.5.3 to /app/pyknotid at commit 441c807dbec2ee32e1da572e24e58d52a4eb7afa. Confirmed system Python 3.13.7, NumPy 2.3.0, gcc 12.2.0, Cython 3.2.6 (installed via pip). Inventoried all Cython sources and Python call sites; found 8 NumPy 2.x scalar-alias issues (np.int x5, np.float x1, np.bool x1) across 3 files plus 3 within ccomplexity.pyx itself. Fix list documented at .kimchi/ferments/019eff5a-e06d-700c-a8fd-2d418e2b5257/docs/fix-list.md.
stepSummaries:
1. Clone https://github.com/SPOCKnots/pyknotid.git at branch 0.5.3 to /app/pyknotid (shallow), record exact commit, and confirm the tree exists. [verified]
  2. Verify system Python and NumPy versions (must report NumPy 2.3.0) and confirm gcc/cc + Python headers are available for Cython compilation. [verified]
  3. Inventory Cython sources (chelpers, ccomplexity, cinvariants) and surrounding Python call sites; produce a fix list referencing file paths and the specific NumPy 2.x symbols/patterns that break. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All 3 steps had real verification: step 1 used git rev-parse + ls (real artifact inspection), step 2 ran the version probes (real system query), step 3 ran grep (real filesystem audit). None are proxy.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1 verify produced commit hash; step 2 verify produced '3.13.7 2.3.0' + '/usr/bin/gcc' + '3.2.6'; step 3 grep produced 8 hit lines.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal: clone + toolchain confirm + inventory. All three delivered: repo cloned and verified, Python/NumPy/Cython/gcc confirmed, fix list written to ferment docs.
gateVerdicts.evidence: .kimchi/ferments/019eff5a-e06d-700c-a8fd-2d418e2b5257/docs/fix-list.md exists with file:line refs for all 8 issues.
